chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-149 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.04.2025 Mr. Mehtab Munir Nirban Advocate along with Applicant. Mr. Wasim Hussain Jafri Advocate for Respondent No.6. Inspector Aamir Hussain Shah on behalf of SSP Jamshoro, ASI Nisar Ahmed Hingoro IO PP Site Kotri and SIP Karam Bux Ansari PS Shahdadpur. -.-.-. Respondent No.4 SHO PS Shahdadpur has produced the detenue. In statement the detenue has recorded before this Court states that she is living with Amjad Bambhro who as per her statement is her husband. Counsel for the Applicant who is mother of the alleged detenue states that she is underage and her medical examination be conducted however no application in this regard has been moved. Even otherwise this is an application u/s 491 Cr.P.C for the production of the detenue. In this case also the said has been done and the detenue is present and wants to live freely with Respondent No.6 who she states that is her husband and under no compulsion or force is living with him. In such circumstances, she is allowed to go and live with her husband. In such circumstances, with this observation the matter stands disposed of. J U D G E Ali Haider
